description: Test that salesforce library includes ListenerConfig in typeDefs

expectedLibraries.name: ballerinax/salesforce
expectedLibraries.description: Salesforce Sales Cloud is one of the leading Customer Relationship Management(CRM) software, provided by Salesforce.Inc. Salesforce enable users to efficiently manage sales and customer relationships through its APIs, robust and secure databases, and analytics services. Sales cloud provides serveral API packages to make operations on sObjects and metadata, execute queries and searches, and listen to change events through API calls using REST, SOAP, and CometD protocols.

typeDefs.name: API_VERSION
typeDefs.description: Constant field `API_VERSION`. Holds the value for the Salesforce API version.

typeDefs.name: EMPTY_STRING
typeDefs.description: Constant field `EMPTY_STRING`. Holds the value of "".

typeDefs.name: REPLAY_FROM_TIP
typeDefs.description: To get all new events sent after subscription. This option is the default

typeDefs.name: REPLAY_FROM_EARLIEST
typeDefs.description: To get all new events sent after subscription and all past events within the retention window

typeDefs.name: HTTP_ERROR_MSG
typeDefs.value: Error occurred while getting the HTTP response.

typeDefs.name: ERR_EXTRACTING_ERROR_MSG
typeDefs.value: Error occured while extracting errors from payload.

typeDefs.name: INVALID_CLIENT_CONFIG
typeDefs.value: Invalid values provided for client configuration parameters.

fields.name: password

fields.name: readTimeout

fields.name: keepAliveInterval
fields.description: The maximum duration in seconds that a connection is kept alive without activity

fields.name: apiVersion
fields.description: The Salesforce API version to use for Streaming API

typeDefs.name: ReplayOptions
typeDefs.description: The replay options representing the point in time when events are read.

members.name: REPLAY_FROM_TIP
members.description: To get all new events sent after subscription. This option is the default

typeDefs.description: Header fields that contain information about the event.

fields.description: The date and time when the change occurred, represented as the number of milliseconds since January 1, 1970 00:00:00 GMT

fields.name: transactionKey
fields.description: Uniquely identifies the transaction that the change is part of

fields.description: Origin of the change. Use this field to find out what caused the change.

fields.description: The operation that caused the change

fields.name: entityName
fields.description: The name of the standard or custom object for this record change

fields.name: sequenceNumber
fields.description: Identifies the sequence of the change within a transaction

fields.name: commitUser

fields.name: commitNumber
fields.description: The system change number (SCN) of a committed transaction

fields.name: recordId
fields.description: The record ID for the changed record

typeDefs.name: CdcService
typeDefs.description:
Triggers when a new Change Data Capture event is received from Salesforce channels.
Available actions: onCreate, onUpdate, onDelete, and onRestore

typeDefs.name: PlatformEventsService
typeDefs.description:
Triggers when a new Platform Event is received from Salesforce channels.
Available action: onMessage

typeDefs.name: Listener
typeDefs.description:
Initializes the listener. During initialization you can set the credentials.
Create a Salesforce account and obtain tokens following [this guide](https://help.salesforce.com/articleView?id=remoteaccess_authenticate_overview.htm).

functions.name: init
functions.description:
Initializes the listener. During initialization you can set the credentials.
Create a Salesforce account and obtain tokens following [this guide](https://help.salesforce.com/articleView?id=remoteaccess_authenticate_overview.htm).

functions.name: attach
functions.description: Attaches the service to the `salesforce:Listener` endpoint.

parameters.name: s
parameters.description: Service object to attach. Use `CdcService` for CDC channels and `PlatformEventsService` for platform events.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Channel name to subscribe to (e.g. `/data/ChangeEvents` or `/event/MyEvent__e`)

return.description: `()` or else a `error` upon failure to register the service

functions.name: 'start
functions.description: Starts the subscription and listen to events on all the attached services.

functions.name: detach
functions.description: Stops subscription and detaches the service from the `salesforce:Listener` endpoint.

return.description: `()` or else a `error` upon failure to detach the service

functions.name: gracefulStop
functions.description: Stops subscription through all consumer services by terminating the connection and all its channels.

return.description: `()` or else a `error` upon failure to close the `salesforce:Listener`

functions.name: immediateStop
functions.description: Stops subscriptions through all the consumer services and terminates the connection with the server.

return.description: `()` or else a `error` upon failure to close ChannelListener.

clients.name: Client
clients.description:
Ballerina Salesforce connector provides the capability to access Salesforce REST API.
This connector lets you to perform operations for SObjects, query using SOQL, search using SOSL, and describe SObjects
and organizational data.

functions.name: init
functions.description:
Initializes the connector. During initialization you can pass either http:BearerTokenConfig if you have a bearer
token or http:OAuth2RefreshTokenGrantConfig if you have Oauth tokens.
Create a Salesforce account and obtain tokens following 
[this guide](https://help.salesforce.com/articleView?id=remoteaccess_authenticate_overview.htm).

return.description: `salesforce:Error` on failure of initialization or else `()`

functions.name: getOrganizationMetaData
functions.description: Gets metadata of your organization.

functions.name: getBasicInfo
functions.description: Gets basic data of the specified object.

functions.name: describe
functions.description:
Completely describes the individual metadata at all levels of the specified object. Can be used to retrieve
the fields, URLs, and child relationships.

functions.name: getPlatformAction
functions.description: Query for actions displayed in the UI, given a user, a context, device format, and a record ID.

functions.name: getApiVersions
functions.description: Lists summary details about each REST API version available.

return.description: List of `Version` if successful. Else, the occurred `error`

functions.name: getResources
functions.description: Lists the resources available for the specified API version.

return.description: `Resources` as a map of string if successful. Else, the occurred `error`

functions.name: getLimits
functions.description: Lists the Limits information for your organization.

return.description: `OrganizationLimits` as a map of `Limit` if successful. Else, the occurred `error`

functions.name: getById
functions.description: Gets an object record by ID.

parameters.name: returnType
parameters.description: The payload, which is expected to be returned after data binding

functions.name: getByExternalId
functions.description: Gets an object record by external ID.

parameters.name: returnType
parameters.description: The payload, which is expected to be returned after data binding

functions.name: create
functions.description: Creates records based on relevant object type sent with json record.

functions.name: update
functions.description: Updates records based on relevant object ID.

return.description: `Nil` if successful, else returns an error

functions.name: upsert
functions.description: Upsert a record based on the value of a specified external ID field.

parameters.name: externalIdField
parameters.description: External ID field of an object

functions.name: delete
functions.description: Delete existing records based on relevant object ID.

functions.name: listReports
functions.description: Lists reports.

return.description: Array of `Report` if successful or else `error`

functions.name: deleteReport
functions.description: Deletes a report.

return.description: `Nil` if the report deletion is successful or else an error

functions.name: runReportSync
functions.description: Runs an instance of a report synchronously.

functions.name: runReportAsync
functions.description: Runs an instance of a report asynchronously.

functions.name: listAsyncRunsOfReport
functions.description: Lists asynchronous runs of a Report.

return.description: Array of `ReportInstance` if successful or else `error`

functions.name: getReportInstanceResult
functions.description: Get report instance result.

functions.name: query
functions.description: Executes the specified SOQL query.

parameters.name: returnType
parameters.description: The payload, which is expected to be returned after data binding

return.description: `stream<{returnType}, error?>` if successful. Else, the occurred `error`

functions.name: search
functions.description: Executes the specified SOSL search.

parameters.name: returnType
parameters.description: The payload, which is expected to be returned after data binding

return.description: `stream<{returnType}, error?>` record if successful. Else, the occurred `error`

functions.name: getDeletedRecords
functions.description: Retrieves the list of individual records that have been deleted within the given timespan.

functions.name: getUpdatedRecords
functions.description: Retrieves the list of individual records that have been updated within the given timespan.

functions.name: isPasswordExpired
functions.description: Get the password information

functions.name: resetPassword
functions.description: Reset the user password.

functions.name: changePassword
functions.description: Change the user password

parameters.name: newPassword
parameters.description: New user password as a string

functions.name: getQuickActions
functions.description: Returns a list of actions and their details

functions.name: batch
functions.description: Executes up to 25 sub-requests in a single request.

parameters.name: batchRequests
parameters.description: A record containing all the requests

parameters.name: haltOnError
parameters.description: If true, the request halts when an error occurs on an individual sub-request

functions.name: getNamedLayouts
functions.description: Retrieves information about alternate named layouts for a given object.

parameters.name: returnType
parameters.description: The payload type, which is expected to be returned after data binding

return.description: Record of `returnType` if successful or else `error`

functions.name: getInvocableActions
functions.description: Retrieve a list of general action types for the current organization.

parameters.name: returnType
parameters.description: The payload type, which is expected to be returned after data binding

return.description: Record of `returnType` if successful or else `error`

functions.name: invokeActions
functions.description: Invoke Actions.

parameters.name: returnType
parameters.description: The type of the returned variable

return.description: Record of `returnType` if successful or else `error`

functions.name: deleteRecordsUsingExtId
functions.description: Delete record using external Id.

parameters.name: externalId
parameters.description: Name of the external id field

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value of the external id field

functions.name: apexRestExecute
functions.description: Access Salesforce APEX resource.

parameters.name: returnType
parameters.description: The payload type, which is expected to be returned after data binding

functions.name: createIngestJob

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: The payload for the bulk job

functions.name: createQueryJob
functions.description: Creates a bulkv2 query job.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: The payload for the bulk job

functions.name: createQueryJobAndWait
functions.description: Creates a bulkv2 query job and provide future value.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: The payload for the bulk job

functions.name: getJobInfo
functions.description: Retrieves detailed information about a job.

parameters.name: bulkOperation
parameters.description: The processing operation for the job

functions.name: addBatch

return.description: `Nil` record if successful or `error` if unsuccessful

functions.name: getAllJobs
functions.description: Get details of all the jobs.

return.description: `AllJobs` record if successful or `error` if unsuccessful

functions.name: getAllQueryJobs
functions.description: Get details of all query jobs.

functions.name: getJobStatus
functions.description: Get job status information.

functions.name: getQueryResult
functions.description: Get bulk query job results

parameters.name: maxRecords
parameters.description: The maximum number of records to retrieve per set of results for the query

return.description: The resulting string[][] if successful else `error`

functions.name: abortJob
functions.description: Abort the bulkv2 job.

parameters.name: bulkOperation
parameters.description: The processing operation for the job

functions.name: deleteJob
functions.description: Delete a bulkv2 job.

parameters.description: The processing operation for the job

functions.name: closeIngestJobAndWait
functions.description: Notifies Salesforce servers that the upload of job data is complete.

functions.name: closeIngestJob
functions.description: Notifies Salesforce servers that the upload of job data is complete.

parameters.name: listenerConfig
parameters.description: The configuration of Salesforce ASB listener.

methods.description: The `onCreate` method is triggered when a new record create event is received from Salesforce.

parameters.description: The information about the triggered event.

methods.description: The `onUpdate` method is triggered when a new record update event is received from Salesforce.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: The information about the triggered event.

methods.description: The `onDelete` method is triggered when a new record delete event is received from Salesforce.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: The information about the triggered event.

methods.description: The `onRestore` method is triggered when a new record restore event is received from Salesforce.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: The information about the triggered event.
